7:["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-zinc max-w-none","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8 not-prose","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-2","children":"My Book on Building Production AI Agents"}],["$","time",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"January 12, 2026"}]]}],[["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"I'm excited to announce that my book on building production AI agents will be published in March 2026. This post gives a preview of the content and explains why I wrote it."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Why This Book?"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"After building Shannon, a multi-agent platform deployed at several Fortune 500 companies, I realized there's a gap in the literature. Most books on AI agents focus on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Academic research and theoretical frameworks"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Simple tutorials that don't scale"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Specific frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT) that change monthly"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"What's missing is practical guidance for building robust, production-grade agent systems that can handle real-world complexity."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"What the Book Covers"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Part I: Foundations"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 function calling patterns"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Memory systems and context management"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Part II: Multi-Agent Systems"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Communication patterns (hierarchical, flat, market-based)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Coordination mechanisms (consensus, voting, auctions)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Fault tolerance and recovery strategies"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Part III: Production Considerations"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Observability and debugging"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"Cost agents"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Key Insights"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"One of the most important lessons from the book:"}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"className":"border-l-4 border-muted pl-4 italic my-4","children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"The hardest problems in agent systems are not AI problems — they're systems engineering problems."}]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Retry logic, circuit breakers, idempotency, observability — these boring infrastructure concerns matter more than the latest prompting technique."}],"\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15"]]}]
